reasoning: The market price for this question on October 30, 2025, was 4%. As of November 9, 2025, 10 more days have passed without an Article 5 invocation, leaving less than two months (approx. 52 days) in the year. The historical base rate for invoking Article 5 is extremely low, having only occurred once in NATO's 75-year history. Even with ongoing geopolitical tensions involving member states or neighboring conflicts, NATO members have strongly avoided invoking Article 5 (preferring consultations under Article 4) to prevent major escalation. Adjusting the recent market price for the passage of time, a 3% probability appropriately reflects the remaining time-decayed tail risk for the rest of 2025.
